title: Random Loading Screens
description: This resource pack uses random Minecraft related backgrounds to make your menus a little bit more interesting!
body:
Loading Screens - Random

This is a resource pack for the Loading Backgrounds Mod. This resourcepack adds many nature, medieval, futuristic, and city themed images to your background when loading up your minecraft worlds and switching dimensions or worlds.

Requires the mod: Loading Backgrounds

Can this be used on a server? Yes, it works on 99% of servers.

 

 

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix

Support Server: [https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt](https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt)
